name: John Carter
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $309,810 for John Carter in U.S. House, TX-31. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
